    "Test blinds missing or not rated for test pressure",
    "Uncontrolled pressure release hazard",
    "Potential for catastrophic blind failure during test"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop all pressure testing activities",
    "Clear and barricade the test area",
    "Verify and install properly rated test blinds per ASME B31.3 §345",
    "Re-inspect test setup before resuming"
  ],
  "rationale": "Pressure testing without properly rated test blinds creates a critical risk of sudden, uncontrolled energy release, which can cause severe injury or death. ASME B31.3 §345 requires test equipment to be rated for the test pressure. Missing or under-rated blinds are a non-compliant, defective condition that must be corrected before work proceeds.",
  "references": ["ASME B31.3 §345"]
}
